package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/xml"
)

// scenario for xml_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: The same local XML payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: mod; severity: contextual.
type Rule434NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
	Count int
}

func scenario434Negative(payload []byte) (Rule434NegativeRecord, error) {
	var output Rule434NegativeRecord
	err := xml.Unmarshal(payload, &output)
	return output, err
}
